name: aer-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for top-5 economics manuscripts targeted at AER, AER: Insights, and AEJ.

plugins.name: aer-skills
plugins.description: Fourteen-skill bundle covering the AER manuscript lifecycle: topic selection, literature positioning with citation verification, identification, robustness, body-section drafting, introduction, tables/figures, manuscript consistency audit, adversarial referee simulation, replication, submission, rebuttal, and the workflow router, plus the optional StatsPAI implementation engine. Ships with Stata, R, and Python templates plus replication-package skeleton and classic-paper exemplars.
